adm_mobility.description: Shows how much difficulty the patient has with walking or moving around at admission.
adm_mobility.clinical_note: Higher values may indicate poorer physical function and may contribute to a higher risk of QoL decline.

adm_personal_care.description: Reflects the patient's ability to wash and dress independently at admission.
adm_personal_care.clinical_note: Higher impairment may suggest reduced independence and greater care needs.

adm_normal_activity.description: Measures difficulty in performing usual daily activities such as work, study, or housework.
adm_normal_activity.clinical_note: Greater limitation can indicate reduced day-to-day functioning.

adm_pain_uncomfort.description: Represents the patient's pain or physical discomfort level at admission.
adm_pain_uncomfort.clinical_note: Higher pain burden may worsen quality of life and recovery potential.

adm_anxiety_depress.description: Captures emotional distress such as anxiety or depressive symptoms at admission.
adm_anxiety_depress.clinical_note: Psychological distress can strongly affect perceived quality of life.

adm_vas.description: The patient's self-rated health score at admission using the visual analogue scale.
adm_vas.clinical_note: Lower perceived health may reflect a more vulnerable condition.

age.clinical_note: Age may influence recovery pattern, resilience, and functional status.

qol_pre_total.description: The total admission quality-of-life score before discharge outcome is known.
qol_pre_total.clinical_note: Poorer baseline QoL may be linked to higher risk of adverse outcome.

gender.description: Encoded gender variable used by the model.
gender.clinical_note: This is a demographic feature and should be interpreted carefully.

adm_total_burden.description: Combined burden across the five admission EQ-5D dimensions.
adm_total_burden.clinical_note: Higher total burden reflects broader overall health difficulties.

adm_function_score.description: Combined score based on mobility, personal care, and normal activity.
adm_function_score.clinical_note: Higher values suggest greater functional impairment.

adm_distress_score.description: Combined score based on pain/discomfort and anxiety/depression.
adm_distress_score.clinical_note: Higher values suggest greater physical and emotional distress.

adm_problem_count.description: Counts how many admission QoL domains show problems.
adm_problem_count.clinical_note: A higher count suggests more dimensions of health are affected.

adm_severe_count.description: Counts how many admission QoL domains are in the severe range.
adm_severe_count.clinical_note: More severe problems may indicate a more fragile clinical state.

vas_gap.description: Represents a derived gap measure related to the VAS score used in the model.
vas_gap.clinical_note: This feature should be interpreted based on how it was engineered in your pipeline.
